Title: ALTER USER SET PASSWORD
Description: Change the password of the current user account
Example to change the default password of system user monetdb (when connected as monetdb):
See also: ALTER USER SET , ALTER USER RENAME , GRANT PRIVILEGES .
Examples:
ALTER USER SET [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD
new_pass_phrase
USING OLD PASSWORD
old_pass_phrase

SELECT CURRENT_USER;
ALTER USER SET PASSWORD 'make it private' USING OLD PASSWORD 'monetdb';
